title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 78.390 - Penalties
text:
78.390.  Penalties. — The council of such city shall have the power to pass ordinances imposing suitable penalties for the punishment of persons violating any of the provisions of sections 78.010 to 78.420 relating to the civil service commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 7069) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6919; 1919 § 8386
